…90c). Calibration This process is performed to correct the approximations made for calculating the radiocarbon age and correcting the atmospheric carbon concentration. Calibration was performed using the Oxcal software (Bronk Ramsey, 2009) from the southern hemisphere atmospheric curve, called SHCall3 (Hogg et al, 2013). …l software (Bronk Ramsey, 2009) from the southern hemisphere atmospheric curve, called SHCall3 (Hogg et al, 2013). Result The sample dating LACUFF 180226 code, resulted in a conventional radiocarbon age of 1040 ± 15 BP (Before Present) (Stuivere Polach 1977).
